name: Ubisoft
philosophy: Ubisoft's web presence is cinematic gaming-publisher chrome — dark canvas (#0e1318) with edge-to-edge game key art, the Ubisoft swirl logo as the brand mark, and cinematic-trailer-grade hero treatments. The atmosphere is action-blockbuster: each franchise (Assassin's Creed, Far Cry, Rainbow Six, The Division) brings its own dark-toned IP color treatment, with the Ubisoft chrome providing the connective tissue.

design_language.motion_signature: Cinematic trailer-style motion — auto-playing video heroes with parallax depth, slow ken-burns pans on key art. Card hover triggers a hard 200ms scale + slight bloom. Carousel transitions are deliberately weighty.

trademark_signals: Dark cinematic canvas (#0e1318) — game key art is the page atmosphere
Ubisoft swirl logo — the brand mark, often white-on-dark or inverted depending on context
Franchise-driven IP color treatments — Assassin's Creed cream/red, Far Cry orange/dust, Rainbow Six tactical-gray
Cinematic auto-playing trailer heroes with mute toggle
Rectilinear game cards (0–8px radius) — the brand reads as console-game-store, not soft-SaaS
ai_slop_avoided: Don't replace the dark canvas with white — cinematic key art demands dark backdrop
Don't strip the franchise IP color treatments — each franchise has its own palette identity
Don't soften card radii above 8px — the brand reads as console-game-store, not soft consumer SaaS
Don't autoplay video with sound — mute is default, audio toggle is user-initiated
